synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-28051 Oracle Linux 10 bind bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28051
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28051

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28051.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
